rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions and output guarantees.
generic_rules: Declare helper variables with explicit types matching their expressions.
Formulate range assumptions using named constants or visible relations.
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are syntactically valid with proper scoping.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE.
Wrap guarantee and assumption clauses in proper annex block syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
